During the procedure, the configuration of the instrument position remains the same even during lymphadenectomy.
The stapler is always introduced from the first port.
During the procedure, the surgical bed position is modified.
The surgical table is tilted from 0 to 30 degrees on the right to have a better vision of the posterior aspect of the hilum or to perform station 7, 8, 9 lymph node dissection.
On the contrary, the bed is tilted from 0° to 30° on the left to reach an optimal control of the anterior aspect of the pulmonary hilum.
In conclusion, we think that our new operative position could be the future further effective technical variation to perform vassilobectomy.
